compiled_state.title: RED: Contract test for resolution loop section in SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-resolution-loop.sh — contract test for the resolution loop section in implementation-plan SKILL.md.

**Test functions** (all awk-scoped to "### Resolution Loop" section of SKILL.md):
1. test_resolution_loop_section_exists — grep for "### Resolution Loop" heading
2. test_accept_revise_escalate — grep for accept, revise, and escalate keywords
3. test_cycle_bound — grep for "2 cycles" or "max.*2" cycle limit
4. test_state_file_persistence — grep for "/tmp/approach-resolution" state file reference
5. test_user_escalation — grep for user escalation after cycle limit
6. test_decision_maker_dispatch — grep for "approach-decision-maker" agent reference

Use _snapshot_fail/_assert_pass_if_clean pattern. Register RED markers in .test-index.

**TDD**: All 6 tests FAIL against current SKILL.md (no resolution loop section). RED markers registered.

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-resolution-loop.sh (create)
- .test-index (modify — add mapping and RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0 with RED markers tolerating failures
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-resolution-loop.sh
- [ ] At least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-resolution-loop.sh | { read n; [ "$n" -ge 6 ]; }
- [ ] .test-index RED markers registered
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_resolution_loop_section_exists\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index maps SKILL.md to test file
  Verify: grep "implementation-plan/SKILL.md" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "test-implementation-plan-resolution-loop.sh"
